untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a dual-leg spread strategy (leg 1 and leg 2) with paired stochastic calculations (Stochastic1 and Stochastic2 based on separate price series). The backtest engine only supports single-instrument indicators. The custom stress indicator combining two stochastic series is not available in the allowed indicators list. Additionally, the signal specifies simultaneous opposite positions (sell leg 1 + buy leg 2, or vice versa) which requires spread/pair trading infrastructure not modeled in single-instrument rules.
translation_notes: The original signal uses a custom 'stress indicator' derived from two separate stochastic calculations on different price streams (leg 1 and leg 2). This is a spread/pairs trading strategy. Mapped thresholds to standard stoch_k for reference, but the dual-leg mechanics cannot be faithfully represented in single-instrument rule format.
